title: St. Gallen、St. Gallen — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: St. Gallen、St. Gallenの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

St. GallenはSt. Gallenにある人口76,000の都市です。A historic city in eastern Switzerland known for its UNESCO-listed Abbey District, the Abbey Library of St. Gallen, and a thriving textile and tech industry.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
